'''Crintlians''' were an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Crintlia system/Legends|Crintlia system]]. They were known to aggressively defend their territory, even against foes with a significant numerical or technological advantage.<ref name="Mist">{{JournalCite|7|Mist Encounter}}</ref>
